aeo_readiness.summary: Johnson Family Plumbing & HVAC has a strong foundation but lacks critical elements for AI assistants to cite them effectively. Their current content is keyword-focused but lacks conversational depth and structured data.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and answers.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC repair and installation processes.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No engagement in the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any discrepancies.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and detailed repair processes
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications and expertise through detailed service pages and media mentions

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ and HowTo schema, which are crucial for AI to cite them in response to common queries.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to position your business as the go-to HVAC expert for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; waiting means losing ground and potential customers.
